rules.text: The system SHALL exit immediately if no search criteria are received [seq 214].
The system SHALL clear non-key flags and exit if no changes are found between old and new data [seq 224].
The system SHALL validate Account Status as a Yes/No value [seq 229].
The system SHALL validate Open Date, Expiry Date, and Reissue Date formats [seq 233, 241, 249].
The system SHALL validate Credit Limit, Cash Credit Limit, Current Balance, and Cycle Limits as signed numbers [seq 237, 245, 253, 257, 261].
The system SHALL validate the SSN format [seq 264].
The system SHALL validate the Date of Birth format and apply specific business rules if valid [seq 269-270].
The system SHALL validate the FICO score as a 3-digit numeric value and apply specific business rules if valid [seq 274-278].
The system SHALL validate the First Name as a required 25-character alphanumeric field [seq 281-282].
The system SHALL validate the Middle Name as an optional 25-character alphanumeric field [seq 286-287].
